reasoning: The FIDE Elo base rate for a +1% rating increase is 0.007. Fabiano Caruana's rating in October 2025 was exactly 2789 (per the October 2025 FIDE ratings list on Wikipedia). A 1% increase requires him to gain nearly 28 Elo points to reach 2817. Gaining 28 FIDE points when you are already around 2790 requires a historic performance (e.g., scoring almost perfectly in a top-tier round robbin tournament, akin to his 2014 Sinquefield Cup run). Doing this within less than a month (by Nov 2) or even three months (Jan 24) is extremely unlikely. Given the constraints of the prompt, I set the probabilities near the absolute minimum allowed bound (0.05), increasing slightly to reflect rising uncertainty over later dates.
